case_title: CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION vs. GOFF, PAULETTE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT GOFF, PAULETTE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOFF, PAULETTE $4,105.38 PRINCIPAL, $3,043.98 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,163.36, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE # 890152 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED JUN-23-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOFF, PAULETTE
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION WRIT MAY ISSUE 26-JUL-94
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOFF, PAULETTE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $185.96 AS TO DEFENDANT GOFF, PAULETTE
